name: International investment position - annual
description_short: Annual international investment position data for euro area countries, showing the stock of external assets and liabilities by instrument type and counterpart country. Provides a balance sheet view of external sector exposure.
use_cases: What is the net international investment position of Germany?
How large is the euro area's stock of outward foreign direct investment?
Which countries are the largest creditors and debtors in the euro area?
How has Spain's external debt evolved since the financial crisis?
